annotation_policy: CMT and Koenigsbergian annotations derived from MIPVU-reviewed metaphorical and uncertain lexical units. Each instance cites at least one MIPVU ID with decision_type in MIPVU_METAPHOR_OR_UNCERTAIN_DECISIONS.

entailments: imperial war is represented through fire, sword, extirpation, and the face of the earth
Enemy violence is understood through destructive element, weapon, and earth-body imagery.
cmt.rival_reading: The war is literal, but the phrase condenses political destruction into conventional elemental and bodily imagery.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-fire-sword' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: revolutionary suffering is framed through blood, slain bodies, martyrs, sacrifice, altars, or wounds
Revolutionary commitment is understood through sacrifice and bodily injury.
cmt.rival_reading: Some war deaths are literal, but Paine's rhetoric gives them sacrificial political meaning.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-blood-sacrifice' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: revolutionary suffering is framed through blood, slain bodies, martyrs, sacrifice, altars, or wounds

cmt.rival_reading: Some war deaths are literal, but Paine's rhetoric gives them sacrificial political meaning.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-blood-sacrifice' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-blood-sacrifice' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: imperial dependence or political subjection is framed as slavery, slavishness, chains, bondage, yoke, or shackles
Political oppression is understood through captivity and bodily restraint.
cmt.rival_reading: Paine applies coercive bodily restraint vocabulary to constitutional and imperial dependence.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-bondage-liberty' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-blood-sacrifice' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: government or the people are construed as a body, mechanism, or material structure
Collective political order is understood through bodies, repair, and materials.
cmt.rival_reading: Political collectives and constitutions are abstract institutions, not literal bodies or machines.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-body-government' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: colonial relation, independence, and founding are represented through parenthood, infancy, birth, and a new world
Revolutionary founding is understood through kinship and birth-generation.
cmt.rival_reading: Political colonies, pamphlets, and founding moments are not literal parents, infants, worlds, or births.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-parent-birth' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: isolated natural life is compared to sickness, misfortune, death, and perishing
Social vulnerability is understood through bodily illness and death.
cmt.rival_reading: Paine uses physical mortality to explain the social necessity of cooperation.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-disease-death' marked 5 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: gravitating / power / form / impregnable / vice / form

entailments: necessity forms society like physical gravity, while heaven is imagined as a fortress against vice
Society and virtue are understood through physical force and defense.
cmt.rival_reading: Social formation and moral purity are abstract but are explained through physical force and fortification.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-gravity-fortress' marked 6 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: government or the people are construed as a body, mechanism, or material structure

cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-body-government' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: eyes / dazzled / ears / deceived / warp / darken / voice / nature / reason

entailments: judgment and reason are represented through sight, hearing, darkness, voice, and agency
Political judgment is understood through bodily perception and personified reason.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract faculties are treated as embodied perceivers or speakers.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-voice-reason' marked 9 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: monarchy is attacked through sacred parody, idolatry, bodily decay, and heavenly sovereignty
Monarchical power is understood through false worship and mortal body imagery.
cmt.rival_reading: Royal authority is political, but Paine frames it through religious transgression and bodily mortality.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'paine-anti-monarchy-sacred-parody' marked 5 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.
